chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D- 3355 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.14744/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025 Mr.Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent. Provisional release has been ordered herein vide office order dated 12.07.2024. It is jointly stated that the petition may be disposed of with directions that the fate of security shall be subject to the outcome of proceedings before Collector (Appeals). Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
